violations.text: Per interview, food contact equipment (herb slicer) does not get washed/sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front retail door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
Inspector observed personal cookers/hot water kettles stored in the restroom. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
